_description: Static boilerplate text. Client can edit these without touching code.
terms: Proposal valid for 30 days from date of submission.
A 50% deposit is required upon contract execution; balance due upon project completion.
All work to be performed during normal business hours unless otherwise agreed in writing.
Owner to provide unobstructed access to work areas 48 hours prior to scheduled installation.
Any changes to scope will be documented via written change order prior to execution.
All materials are first quality. Labour is warranted for one year from date of installation.
Extra work not specified herein will be charged at an additional cost.
This proposal expires 30 days from date of issue.
closing: We appreciate the opportunity to submit this proposal and look forward to working with you.
